title: Is Germany looking again at coal-powered electricity?
abstract: Is Germany looking again at coal-powered electricity? may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform genera...
abstract_zh: 德国又要翻煤炭旧账了？别看这工具多小众，一出手就是精准打击能源焦虑！在这AI大潮中，它就像个小矮人扛大山，专治各种用电慌。不用愁，技术再牛也挡不住它的煤电魅力！
